description: Validate elastic tether, rope, or bungee-style constrained motion using rest length, bounded extension, constraint trace, and rebound velocity toward the anchor. Bungee is only the smoke family.
physical_assumptions: The elastic constraint has a structured rest length, maximum extension, stiffness, and damping label.
The constrained body may stretch the tether under gravity or impulse but must not exceed the declared extension limit.
After peak extension, the constrained body must rebound toward the anchor.
The elastic tether is a physics constraint; visual rope/cord assets are optional helpers.
verifier_rules: Rest length, max extension, and stiffness are positive.
Constraint trace exists and references anchor/body ids.
The body stretches at least expected_min_extension_m.
After maximum stretch, velocity toward the anchor exceeds expected_min_rebound_speed_m_s.
repair_suggestions: Reduce impulse/drop height or increase max_extension_m if overstretch occurs.
Add rebound velocity toward the anchor after peak stretch.
